notes:
Update of Ages!

What happens when Rhino travels thousands of years into the past? A world of caves, stone tools, and friendly cave people is waiting to be explored! Join this timeless adventure in our latest update!

Be sure to update to the latest version of Toy Blast for the newest content. Every 2 weeks, we bring you 50 NEW LEVELS!

Come and have fun!

title: Foundation: Galactic Frontier
notes:
Update Highlights:
1. Optimized the duration of the Sacred Tribute Vessel, which is now set to 3 hours.
2. Improved the display of Guild Chest information by removing portrait frames.
3. Other optimizations and bug fixes.

title: Lords Mobile: Kingdom Wars
notes:
Football fever has gripped not just the world, but the Kingdoms of Athena as well!
Take part in the Lords Ball Carnival to get an event Castle Skin, Army Skin, Route Skin, Turf Decorations, Emotes, and many more!

# Various UI adjustments:
．Guild Fest: Added special quest requirement note to Gear Crafting quests: "Must unlock the Lunar Foundry to complete quest"
．Hero Stages: Added Hero Ultimate skill range display during Auto Battle
．Revamped the Shelter's interface (Only affects Quick Battle)
